content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

September 4, 2002

Garrett Biggs
Blair • Biggs Campaigns
21000 Devonshire Street, Suite 101A
Chatsworth, CA 91311

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-120

Dear Mr. Biggs:

This letter is in response to your request for written advice on the campaign provisions of the Political Reform Act.1 Under California Code of Regulations 18329(b)(8)(B), copy enclosed, unless you are an authorized representative of the candidate for whom you seek assistance, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your questions or provide analysis.

Should you have additional questions regarding this matter, please do not hesitate to contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

[Signature]
Hyla P. Wagner
Senior Legal Counsel

Enclosure
HPW/jg

1. Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
